violations.text: Deli meats and cheeses observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the 1-door and 2-door refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Single service utensils and containers were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food and food service products must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Spray bottle observed not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
